personality_one_liner: A premium, cinematic dark mode experience blending charcoal blacks with deep forest greens and antique gold to evoke traditional Ayurvedic wisdom and modern medical excellence.

spacing.rule: Generous, cinematic padding. Use spacing to create focus rather than rigid lines. Card layouts should have plenty of breathing room.

do's: Use heavy frosted glass (blur with >=75% surface/surfaceSecondary tint) for bottom tab bar, sticky headers, and floating action buttons.
Apply glass overlays on top of hero images and course cards for a premium, cinematic feel.
Ensure text on glass is fully readable by using a sufficiently opaque under-tint.
dont's: Do not use glass for text input fields or body content regions.
Do not stack more than two glass surfaces simultaneously.

screens.name: Home / Course Catalog
screens.purpose: A premium discovery surface for Ayurveda courses, blending traditional imagery with modern Bento Grid layouts.

states.loading: Centered gold brand spinner on deep green surface.
states.empty: Subtle glass icon with 'No courses available' and a refresh CTA.

screens.layout: Implement a Bento Grid (mixed 1x1, 1x2, 2x2 cards) for discovering Daily Lessons, Featured Topics, and the core catalog. Use high-contrast Playfair Display typography overlaid on tinted imagery (gradient-to-dark scrim). Ensure safe-area clearance and large tap targets.

screens.name: Course Detail
screens.purpose: Cinematic presentation of course content, converting interest into enrollment.

states.loading: Skeleton screen matching the hero and list layout.
states.error: Failed to load course details. Retry.

screens.layout: Large hero image stretching to the top edge (ignoring safe area for visual impact but padding content inside), with a vertical gradient scrim (transparent to 80% surfaceSecondary) behind the course title. Sticky primary CTA ('Enroll Now' / 'Buy') fixed at the bottom over a glassmorphic bar. Scrollable list of modules (PDF, Word, Video) underneath.

screens.name: Lesson Player
screens.purpose: Immersive, distraction-free environment for reading PDFs, Word docs, or watching videos.
screens.layout: Full-bleed video player at top or integrated PDF/Doc viewer. Dark UI controls to minimize eye strain. Sticky 'Next Lesson' CTA at bottom.

screens.name: MCQ Quiz
screens.purpose: Gamified, Tinder-like swipe card interface for answering questions.
screens.layout: Stacked card UI centered on the screen. The top card shows the question and image. User swipes left or right to navigate between questions or select options. Cards should have a subtle 3D shadow and smooth reanimated gestures. Progress bar at the top.

screens.name: My Learning
screens.purpose: Track progress, view certificates, and manage ongoing courses.

states.empty: Illustration of a brass lamp with 'Your learning journey begins here.' + 'Browse Courses' CTA.

screens.layout: List-based view with rich surfaceSecondary cards displaying progress bars and course thumbnails. Dedicated section or tabs for 'Active', 'Completed', and 'Certificates'.

screens.name: Notes
screens.purpose: A reflective, quiet space for students to review personal notes.

states.empty: Illustration of a leaf + 'No notes yet. Add your first insight.'

screens.layout: Grid or masonry layout of note cards. Floating Action Button (glass over brandTertiary) to create a new note.

screens.name: Profile
screens.layout: Large avatar (or initials if missing) centered. List of settings and achievements using brandTertiary tinted icons for list leading visuals.

logo_fallback.alt: Brass oil lamp symbolizing knowledge and tradition

course_massage.alt: Hand holding wooden massage tool on dark background

instructions_to_main_agent: Adhere STRICTLY to the Glass / Luxe DARK personality. No blue, indigo, or purple colors. The UI is anchored in deep charcoal green (surface: #0A0D0B) and Antique Gold (brand: #C5A059).
Use Playfair Display for display/headings to evoke academic prestige and tradition, paired with Satoshi for high readability in body text.
For the Home screen, use a Bento Grid layout for course discovery. Cards should vary in size (e.g., 2x2 featured, 1x2 secondary) to create a magazine-like Pinterest flow.
Implement the MCQ Quiz screen using 'react-native-reanimated' and 'react-native-gesture-handler' to create a Tinder-like swipeable card stack. Ensure cards snap back if not swiped past the threshold.
Any text placed over images MUST have a 3-stop vertical gradient scrim (transparent to >=75% surfaceInverse/surfaceSecondary) behind it. Do not rely on raw image contrast.
Include a Razorpay/Stripe checkout screen/modal as part of the 'Buy/Enroll' flow from the Course Detail screen.
Use 'react-native-pdf' or similar for PDF viewing, and 'expo-av' or 'react-native-video' for the media player.
Wire haptics to the Quiz swipe actions (success/error vibration depending on swipe) and to the primary Enroll buttons.
